prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical 3:4 image of a serene cyberpunk Japanese tea house scene: a young woman in an ornate red-and-cream kimono with gold floral embroidery sits at a low wooden table in a traditional room with shoji screens, wooden beams, and an open view to a sunlit Japanese garden with roof tiles, greenery, and soft bokeh. Her long glossy black hair falls over her shoulders, and the right side of her head and both hands reveal elegant white-and-black android prosthetics; her face is intentionally covered by a plain warm brown rectangular privacy mask with no facial features. In front of her is an elaborate seasonal shaved ice dessert, Red Moon Snow Flower Shaved Ice, piled high in a black lacquer bowl with gold floral decoration. The shaved ice is white with deep red syrup cascading down the top, pale round mochi balls at the front, tiny edible white and pink blossoms, gold leaf flecks, and one black-and-gold decorative butterfly-shaped garnish. The table setting contains exactly 5 main tabletop elements: 1 large lacquer bowl of shaved ice, 1 red lacquer spoon placed on a black round tray, 1 dark ceramic tea cup to the right, 1 upright menu card on the left, and 1 small cafe logo card on the right. Add exactly 2 printed cards: the left menu card has an elegant Japanese cafe menu layout with the visible title text 「季節限定」, the large product name 「紅月雪花かき氷」, descriptive Japanese lines, and price 「¥2,300(税込)」; the right card shows a circular floral crest and the cafe name 「CAFE 紅月庵」 with small romanized text “Kougetsu An”. Add exactly 2 blossom arrangements: a small vase or branch cluster with pale cherry blossoms on the left edge of the table, and scattered loose petals on the tray. Lighting should be warm late-afternoon sunlight from the left, cinematic depth of field, realistic reflections on lacquer, delicate steamless dessert texture, high detail, cozy premium cafe atmosphere, no extra people, no watermark, no modern signage beyond the two cards.
